scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit:business-info && npm run audit:services && npm run audit:stripe-tax && npm run audit:security
scripts.audit:dependencies: npm --prefix frontend audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high && npm --prefix backend audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
